bead.title: bench: add harness/surface/concurrency_group to profile schema
bead.description:
Add three optional fields to the Profile struct in internal/benchmark/profile/profile.go and populate them in every YAML under scripts/benchmark/profiles/.

Schema additions:
- harness: 'none' | 'anthropic' | 'codex' | 'pi' | 'opencode' (default 'none')
- surface: 'fiz_provider_native' | 'fiz_harness_anthropic' | 'fiz_harness_codex' | 'fiz_harness_pi' | 'fiz_harness_opencode' | 'native_cli' | 'frontier_native' | 'frontier_harness'
- concurrency_group: string (rate-limit shard key, e.g. 'openrouter', 'sindri-gpu')

In-scope files:
- internal/benchmark/profile/profile.go (add fields to Profile struct with yaml:",omitempty")
- internal/benchmark/profile/profile_test.go (cover new fields)
- scripts/benchmark/profiles/*.yaml (~24 files; populate fields)

For wrapper-harness profiles (fiz-harness-claude-sonnet-4-6.yaml, fiz-harness-codex-gpt-5-4-mini.yaml, fiz-harness-pi-*.yaml, fiz-harness-opencode-*.yaml), populate harness: from the filename. For all others, harness: none.

Map surface from current lane.lane_type in scripts/benchmark/terminalbench-2-1-sweep.yaml. Map concurrency_group from current resource_group assignment (drop the 'rg-' prefix).

Out-of-scope (file separate beads):
- Runner changes that read the new fields (PR 1c)
- bench-sets/ creation (PR 1b)
- concurrency-groups.yaml creation (PR 1b)

Spec: docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-05-15-benchmark-runner-simplification.md section 'PR 1a'
ADR: docs/helix/02-design/adr/ADR-016-cells-are-self-describing-evidence.md
bead.acceptance:
1. 'go test ./internal/benchmark/profile/...' passes.
2. 'go build ./...' passes.
3. Every file in scripts/benchmark/profiles/*.yaml has populated harness, surface, and concurrency_group fields.
4. 'grep -L "harness:\|surface:\|concurrency_group:" scripts/benchmark/profiles/*.yaml' returns no files (all profiles have all three).
